title: checkout-service latency spike post-deployment
summary: P99 latency exceeded 3s threshold (baseline 280ms) following deployment of v1.8.3. Database timeout exceptions rose 3.8x. Checkout success rate dropped to 61%.

title: payment-api 5xx error surge
summary: payment-api returning HTTP 503 at 12% of requests. Upstream timeout from payment processor gateway. Circuit breaker opened at 09:18.

title: auth-service slow login degradation
summary: Token validation latency increased from 45ms to 320ms average. Redis session cache hit ratio fell from 94% to 67%. No errors yet, but trending toward impact threshold.

title: inventory-service memory leak
summary: Container memory usage at 94% and climbing. GC pause times increasing. Two pods have OOMKilled in the last hour. Service auto-restarting every ~45 minutes.

title: notification-service queue backlog
summary: Email notification queue depth reached 50k messages. Processing delay of 35 minutes for transactional emails. Root cause: undersized consumer group. Scaled to 6 consumers. Resolved at 07:45.
